methods.name: depkit.depmanager.DependencyManager.__aenter__
documentation: Set up dependencies on context entry.

methods.name: depkit.depmanager.DependencyManager._detect_uv_environment
documentation: Detect if we're running in a uv environment.

methods.name: depkit.depmanager.DependencyManager._get_pip_command
documentation: Get the appropriate pip command based on environment and settings.

methods.name: depkit.depmanager.DependencyManager.install_requirements
documentation:
Install missing requirements.

Raises:
    DependencyError: If installation fails

methods.name: depkit.depmanager.DependencyManager.ensure_importable
documentation: Ensure a module can be imported.

methods.name: depkit.depmanager.DependencyManager.check_requirements
documentation:
Check which requirements need to be installed.

Returns:
    List of requirements that are not yet installed

methods.name: depkit.depmanager.DependencyManager.update_python_path
documentation:
Add extra paths to Python path.

Updates sys.path with extra paths from settings, ensuring they exist
and are absolute paths.

Logs warnings for invalid paths but doesn't raise exceptions.

methods.name: depkit.depmanager.DependencyManager.verify_paths
documentation:
Verify that paths exist and are accessible.

Args:
    paths: Sequence of paths to verify

Raises:
    DependencyError: If any path is invalid or inaccessible

methods.name: depkit.depmanager.DependencyManager.get_installed_requirements
documentation:
Get list of requirements that were installed.

Returns:
    List of installed requirement strings

methods.name: depkit.depmanager.DependencyManager.get_python_paths
documentation:
Get current Python path entries.

Returns:
    List of paths in sys.path

methods.name: depkit.depmanager.DependencyManager.setup
documentation:
Complete setup of dependencies.

This is the main entry point that should be called to set up
all dependencies. It:
1. Installs missing requirements
2. Updates Python path
3. Verifies all paths exist

Raises:
    DependencyError: If setup fails
